title: hieracium altenahrense
side_effects: Hieracium altenahrense can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and increased risk of bleeding due to its anticoagulant properties. Ingesting the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while long-term exposure may lead to liver damage and kidney failure. It can also interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate conditions like diabetes and high blood pressure. Improper use of Hieracium altenahrense can have severe consequences, so it is crucial to consult a medical professional before using it as a treatment.
